div.h1: Intel-Grade Spec: Preemption Flag State Machine
div.p: Component: User-mode Coroutine Scheduler (UMCS) Object: atomic<bool> preempt_flag Memory Alignment: 64-bit aligned, Cache-line isolated (false sharing mitigation)

g.title: Flag is FALSE. Coroutine has CPU affinity.
Flag is TRUE. Set by SIGUSR1 or Monitor Thread.
State saved. Control returned to Scheduler.
Flag is FALSE. Coroutine has CPU affinity.
Flag is TRUE. Set by SIGUSR1 or Monitor Thread.
State saved. Control returned to Scheduler.
